Interface IRelateDescription

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the RelateDescription Interface.

[Guid("BADFD2ED-2776-4B21-879A-B99B2EA582A6")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRelateDescription

Properties

GeoTransformation

Geo transformation required to transform the geometry if the requested GCS is different from the source.

IGeoTransformation GeoTransformation { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeoTransformation

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryResultOptions

Indicates whether we need to modify Geometry.

IGeometryResultOptions GeometryResultOptions { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometryResultOptions

Examples

Sample Snippet

IncludeGeometry

Indicates whether we should include Geometry.

bool IncludeGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

OutputSpatialReference

Spatial reference of the output geometry in the related records.

ISpatialReference OutputSpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

OutputTimeReference

Output time reference for the time fields.

ITimeReference OutputTimeReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ITimeReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

RelatedTableDefinitionExpression

Definition expression of the related table for which related records are being requested.

string RelatedTableDefinitionExpression { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

RelatedTableFields

Table fields that need to be returned as a part of the relate results.

string RelatedTableFields { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

RelationshipID

Relationship ID that uniquely idenentifies a relate to a table.

int RelationshipID { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ResultFormat

Result format that indicates the type of content in the result.

esriRelateResultFormat ResultFormat { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRelateResultFormat
